allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\('\\n'\) for line in lines[-30:]: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\('role', ''\) content = obj.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, str\) and content.strip\(\): print\(f'[{role}]: {content[:300]}'\) elif isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\): if c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'[{role}]: {c[\\"text\\"][:300]}'\) elif c.get\('type'\) == 'tool_use': print\(f'[{role}/tool_use]: {c[\\"name\\"]}'\) elif c.get\('type'\) == 'tool_result': result_content = c.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(result_content, list\): for r in result_content: if isinstance\(r, dict\) and r.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'[tool_result]: {r[\\"text\\"][:200]}'\) elif isinstance\(result_content, str\): print\(f'[tool_result]: {result_content[:200]}'\) except: pass ")
